changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO timetable.organization (id, name, description, days_of_week, periods, created_by, created_date, last_modified_date, deleted) VALUES (2, '3-maktab', ' ', '["MONDAY", "TUESDAY", "WEDNESDAY", "THURSDAY", "FRIDAY", "SATURDAY"]', '[{"name": "1-lesson", "endTime": "09:50", "isBreak": false, "duration": 50, "startTime": "09:00"}, {"name": "2-lesson", "endTime": "10:50", "isBreak": false, "duration": 50, "startTime": "10:00"}, {"name": "3-lesson", "endTime": "11:50", "isBreak": false, "duration": 50, "startTime": "11:00"}, {"name": "Lunch break", "endTime": "12:30", "isBreak": true, "duration": 40, "startTime": "11:50"}, {"name": "4-lesson", "endTime": "13:20", "isBreak": false, "duration": 50, "startTime": "12:30"}, {"name": "5-lesson", "endTime": "14:20", "isBreak": false, "duration": 50, "startTime": "13:30"}, {"name": "6-lesson", "endTime": "15:20", "isBreak": false, "duration": 50, "startTime": "14:30"}, {"name": "7-lesson", "endTime": "16:20", "isBreak": false, "duration": 50, "startTime": "15:30"}]', 1, '2026-01-13 11:39:40.973981', '2026-01-13 11:39:40.973981', false);
